name: open-msupply
description: Connect AI assistants to Open mSupply for querying inventory, stock levels, shipments, requisitions, and more.
long_description:
The Open mSupply MCP server enables AI assistants to interact with your Open mSupply instance via the GraphQL API. Query stock levels, search items, track shipments, view invoices, and get dashboard summaries - all through natural language.

Ships as a self-contained native binary - no runtime required. Requires a running Open mSupply server (v2.x+) with valid credentials.

server_url.title: Server URL
server_url.description: URL of your Open mSupply server (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8000)

store_id.title: Store ID
store_id.description: Default store ID (optional - use list_stores tool to discover available stores)

allow_self_signed.title: Allow Self-Signed Certificates
allow_self_signed.description: Allow connections to servers with self-signed SSL certificates

tools.name: list_stores
tools.description: List all available stores in the Open mSupply instance.

tools.name: get_store
tools.description: Get details of a specific store by its ID.

tools.name: get_server_info
tools.description: Get the Open mSupply server version and connection status.

tools.name: search_items
tools.description: Search for items (products/medicines) by name or code.

tools.name: get_item
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific item by its ID.

tools.name: get_stock_lines
tools.description: Get current stock levels showing available batches, quantities, expiry dates, and locations.

tools.name: get_stock_counts
tools.description: Get summary stock counts including expired items and items expiring soon.

tools.name: get_item_ledger
tools.description: Get the transaction history (ledger) for a specific item.

tools.name: list_invoices
tools.description: List invoices (shipments) with optional filters.

tools.name: get_invoice
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific invoice including all line items.

tools.name: get_outbound_shipment_counts
tools.description: Get counts of outbound shipments by status.

tools.name: get_inbound_shipment_counts
tools.description: Get counts of inbound shipments by status.

tools.name: get_dashboard_summary
tools.description: Get a comprehensive dashboard summary of stock health, shipments, and requisitions.

tools.name: get_requisition_counts
tools.description: Get counts of requisitions by status.

tools.name: search_names
tools.description: Search for suppliers, customers, and facilities by name or code.

tools.name: get_master_lists
tools.description: Get master lists (item catalogs) available for the store.

tools.name: list_requisitions
tools.description: List requisitions (request and response) with optional filters.

tools.name: get_requisition
tools.description: Get detailed information about a requisition including all lines.

tools.name: insert_request_requisition
tools.description: Create a new draft request requisition.

tools.name: update_request_requisition
tools.description: Update a request requisition; set status to SENT to submit.

tools.name: delete_request_requisition
tools.description: Delete a draft request requisition.

tools.name: insert_request_requisition_line
tools.description: Add an item line to a request requisition.

tools.name: update_request_requisition_line
tools.description: Update a request requisition line (quantity, comment).

tools.name: delete_request_requisition_line
tools.description: Remove a line from a request requisition.

tools.name: list_rnr_forms
tools.description: List R&R (Report and Requisition) forms.

tools.name: get_rnr_form
tools.description: Get a specific R&R form with all line consumption data.

tools.name: insert_rnr_form
tools.description: Create a new draft R&R form for a program and period.

tools.name: update_rnr_form
tools.description: Update an R&R form's lines and metadata.

tools.name: finalise_rnr_form
tools.description: Finalise (submit) an R&R form to the supplier.

tools.name: delete_rnr_form
tools.description: Delete a draft R&R form.

tools.name: list_programs
tools.description: List programs (e.g. HIV, TB, immunisation) available in the store.

tools.name: list_periods
tools.description: List reporting periods, filterable by program and date range.

tools.name: get_supplier_program_requisition_settings
tools.description: Get programs/suppliers/periods configured for R&R forms in this store.

tools.name: insert_outbound_shipment
tools.description: Create a draft outbound shipment to a customer.

tools.name: update_outbound_shipment
tools.description: Advance status (NEW->ALLOCATED->PICKED->SHIPPED). Supports backdatedDatetime to seed historic shipments.

tools.name: delete_outbound_shipment
tools.description: Delete a NEW outbound shipment.

tools.name: insert_outbound_shipment_line
tools.description: Add a stock line to an outbound shipment.

tools.name: update_outbound_shipment_line
tools.description: Update an outbound shipment line.

tools.name: delete_outbound_shipment_line
tools.description: Remove an outbound shipment line.

tools.name: insert_inbound_shipment
tools.description: Create a draft inbound shipment (goods receipt) from a supplier.

tools.name: update_inbound_shipment
tools.description: Advance status (SHIPPED->DELIVERED->RECEIVED->VERIFIED). receivedDatetime is backdate-able.

tools.name: delete_inbound_shipment
tools.description: Delete a NEW inbound shipment.

tools.name: insert_inbound_shipment_line
tools.description: Add a received item line with batch/expiry/manufacture dates.

tools.name: update_inbound_shipment_line
tools.description: Update an inbound shipment line.

tools.name: delete_inbound_shipment_line
tools.description: Remove an inbound shipment line.

tools.name: insert_stocktake
tools.description: Create a draft stocktake (physical count).

tools.name: update_stocktake
tools.description: Update stocktake; set stocktakeDate to backdate the count and status=FINALISED to commit.

tools.name: delete_stocktake
tools.description: Delete a draft stocktake.

tools.name: insert_stocktake_line
tools.description: Add a count line to a stocktake.

tools.name: update_stocktake_line
tools.description: Update a stocktake line (counted packs, batch, etc.).

tools.name: delete_stocktake_line
tools.description: Remove a stocktake line.

tools.name: list_purchase_orders
tools.description: List purchase orders filterable by status and supplier.

tools.name: get_purchase_order
tools.description: Get a purchase order with all lines and date fields.

tools.name: insert_purchase_order
tools.description: Create a draft purchase order for a supplier.

tools.name: update_purchase_order
tools.description: Update purchase order status and many date fields (confirmedDatetime, sentDatetime, etc.).

tools.name: delete_purchase_order
tools.description: Delete a draft purchase order.

tools.name: insert_purchase_order_line
tools.description: Add a line to a purchase order.

tools.name: update_purchase_order_line
tools.description: Update a purchase order line (quantity, price, dates, status).

tools.name: delete_purchase_order_lines
tools.description: Delete one or more purchase order lines (bulk).
